title: CSV file reading issue with multi-language content
symptom: When trying to read a CSV file with multi-language content, the first column returns 'undefined'.
not_this_if: CSV file is in a single language
No undefined values in the output
root_cause: The presence of a Byte Order Mark (BOM) in the CSV file can interfere with how the Extract from File node reads the content, leading to undefined values for certain fields.
fix_steps: Open the Extract from File node settings
Enable the option 'Exclude Byte Order Mark (BOM)'
Re-run the workflow to check if the issue is resolved
agent_instruction: Enable 'Exclude Byte Order Mark (BOM)' in the Extract from File node settings.
